title: Implement Jira migration command
description: Once the Atlassian MCP server is registered in `.claude/settings.json` and credentials are configured, add a one-shot command that walks every task file with `jira_key: null`, creates the matching Jira issue, and writes the returned issue key back to the JSON. After migration, the local store becomes an append-only audit log and Jira is the source of truth.
acceptance_criteria: Command is idempotent: re-running it never creates duplicate Jira issues.
Field mapping is one-to-one with no data loss for: title, description, acceptance_criteria (rendered into the Jira description), priority, labels, status (mapped to the matching Jira workflow state).
Each migrated task gets `jira_key` populated and `updated_at` refreshed.
A dry-run flag prints the planned migrations without calling Jira.
